Registry / Terms / instrumental drift

instrumental drift

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #02150 · 4 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 3 distinct definitions — harmonise.
